name: BotC Tracker
description: Track and rate players in Blood on the Clocktower games, with username history tracking and player analysis.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; object-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' https://botc.app https://*.firebaseio.com wss://*.firebaseio.com https://*.googleapis.com wss://*.googleapis.com https://identitytoolkit.googleapis.com https://firestore.googleapis.com;
